creator: namagama37@gmail.com
text: This represents the legacy iteration of my instant-wheezy image. It is designed to be compatible with most 32-bit PCs, various thin-clients with or without PAE, and it is also compatible with any NIC or virtual machines. Addressing a common critique of Debian stable regarding outdated software, I've prioritized backported packages over the stable versions. Additionally, the default 3.2-kernel has been excluded. The minimum hardware specifications include 256 MB RAM (with 512 MB recommended), a 400 MHz i486-CPU, and a 16 GB CompactFlash or bootable USB2. https://doodle-baseball.com/
